name: rOt 3D
short_description: Minimal 3D puzzle game which goal is to get The Ball to the WinBox using the Circles in the scenes. Old obstacles from the franchise, and the return of One Chance Mode.
detailed_description:
Third game of the franchise.
Now in 3D!
Minimal puzzle game which goal is to get The Ball to the WinBox using the Circles in the scenes. New obstacles introduced every 10 levels.

- Old obstacles now in 3D!
- HD Resolution
- 30 Levels
- Steam Achievements
- Simple Interface
- 'One Chance' mode: You have only one chance. If you fail, it's over.

Controls: Arrows and Spacebar,
Mouse for camera control.


Inspired by the amazing game qop

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Finnish, Greek, Dutch, Hungarian, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Thai, Czech, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Arabic
